note.zh: GPT-5.6-Terra(xhigh 思考档位)在 Codex CLI 中用仓库标准中文提示词(仅按案例规则填写文末【本次运行】占位符)一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「拓荒狐」。诊断:工程翻车:自写的 addTop 插入排序有 off-by-one,数组留下 undefined 空洞,act() 几乎每个 tick 都抛 TypeError(top[at-1].raw)。按规则抛异常即该 tick 直行,于是它全程走直线、策略一步未跑成。这是它真实的一次成型水平。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by GPT-5.6-Terra (xhigh effort) in Codex CLI from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt (only the [This run] placeholders filled per case rules), with no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "拓荒狐". Diagnosis: Engineering failure: its own addTop insertion-sort has an off-by-one that leaves an undefined hole, so act() throws a TypeError (top[at-1].raw) almost every tick. Per the rules a thrown act() means a straight move, so it walks in a straight line all match — its real strategy never runs once.
